name: Lightning Rod
descs:
Encounter Start: all allies gain +3 [Charge] Count.

If two or more participating allies have Envy Affinity Attack Skills, all allies gain +5 [Charge] Count instead.

Encounter Start: all allies gain +4 [Charge] Count.

If two or more participating allies have Envy Affinity Attack Skills, all allies gain +6 [Charge] Count instead.

Encounter Start: all allies gain +5 [Charge] Count.

If two or more participating allies have Envy Affinity Attack Skills, all allies gain +7 [Charge] Count instead.
